title: Void Matter Equipment
description: This Mod Adds a new more powerful armor to Minecraft which is a direct upgrade to netherite.
body:
# This is the Void Matter Mod
IMPORTANT:
THIS MOD IS DEPENDENT ON GECKOLIB

### **DOWNLOAD LINK:**

https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib

## **Version 1.1.1 (FABRIC ONLY)**
- Overhauled Armor
- Buffed Pickaxe
- Only in this version no Geckolib required

## **Version 1.1.0**

- Overhauled All Textures
- Added Smithing Upgrade Template for Void matter

## **Version 1.0.0**

### Void Matter Ore

This Ore can be found in "The End" with a rarity of  5 Ore groups per chunk and a maximum of 5 Ores per cluster

### Void Matter Armor

This armor is incredibly Strong and is an upgrade for Netherite it can be crafted using a refined Void Crystal and one Armor Piece of Netherite in the Anvil

### Void Matter Tools

These Tools are very strong with a mining Level above Netherite (in case any other mod goes Higher than Netherite level) and th ey can be obtained the same way the Armor is obtained.

### Void Matter

This is what you optain by Mining Void Matter Ore

### Void Matter Block

You obtain this by crafting 9 Void Matter in a Diamond Block pattern in a crafting table together

### Refined Void Matter

This item can be optained by Cutting a Void Matter Block in a Stone Cutter, this is what is put together with the item you want to upgrade in a smithing table to  make Void Matter Equipment

There are also Food item such as the Void MAtter Apple/Enchanted Void Matter Apple and Void Carrot

### Void Matter Totem

This item can be crafted using a totem and surrounding it with 4 Refined Void Matter Crystals and in the  corner putting diamonds, This item act like an instant Notch apple with 5 Uses. There is no way to Repair the item. This item might sound Overpowered but its Very Hard to get

## Other Info

This Mod was Created by One Person using Mcreator (https://mcreator.net) only
this mod took alot of time to make and i would love some Feedback

The primary reason of the existance of this mod is to provide endgame Equipment to be used in Modpacks that go beyond the normal limits of Vanilla Minecraft since with full Void Matter Equipment it is pretty easy to kill a Warden.
